name: Western Astrology — Canonical
description: A canonical Western astrology grammar covering planets, signs, houses, and aspects with archetypal interpretations. A living document — contribute at github.com/PlayfulProcess/recursive.eco-schemas

sections.Story: The Sun is your core identity — who you are becoming. It represents your conscious will, creative force, and the central organizing principle of your life.
sections.Light: Vitality, self-expression, leadership, creative power, confidence, generosity.
sections.Shadow: Ego inflation, domination, burnout from over-identification with achievement.
sections.Archetype: The King/Queen — sovereign consciousness that gives light and warmth.

sections.Story: The Moon is your emotional body — how you feel, what you need, and where you seek comfort. It governs your instinctual responses and your relationship to home, nurturing, and memory.
sections.Light: Emotional intelligence, receptivity, nurturing, intuition, responsiveness.
sections.Shadow: Moodiness, dependency, emotional overwhelm, clinging to the past.
sections.Archetype: The Mother — the container that holds and nourishes life.

sections.Story: Mercury is the mind in motion — how you think, communicate, and make sense of the world. It governs language, learning, commerce, and the bridges between things.
sections.Light: Articulate, curious, adaptable, quick-witted, perceptive.
sections.Shadow: Overthinking, trickery, scattered attention, nervousness.
sections.Archetype: The Messenger — the one who carries meaning between worlds.

sections.Story: Venus is what you love, what you value, and how you attract. She governs beauty, pleasure, relationship, aesthetics, and the principle of harmony.
sections.Light: Grace, magnetism, aesthetic sense, diplomacy, devotion.
sections.Shadow: Vanity, possessiveness, people-pleasing, overindulgence.
sections.Archetype: The Lover — the force that draws things together through beauty.

sections.Story: Mars is your drive, desire, and fighting spirit. It governs how you assert yourself, pursue what you want, and handle conflict and competition.
sections.Light: Courage, initiative, passion, decisiveness, physical vitality.
sections.Shadow: Aggression, impatience, recklessness, anger, domination.
sections.Archetype: The Warrior — the force that cuts through and takes action.

sections.Story: Jupiter is expansion, meaning, and faith. It governs your search for truth, your sense of abundance, and your capacity for growth, wisdom, and joy.
sections.Light: Generosity, optimism, wisdom, philosophical depth, good fortune.
sections.Shadow: Excess, overconfidence, dogmatism, restlessness, waste.
sections.Archetype: The Sage — the one who sees the larger pattern and offers meaning.

sections.Story: Saturn is structure, time, and responsibility. It governs your relationship to limits, mastery, maturity, and the hard-won wisdom that comes from endurance.
sections.Light: Discipline, integrity, perseverance, mastery, wisdom through experience.
sections.Shadow: Rigidity, fear, depression, excessive control, self-denial.
sections.Archetype: The Elder — the keeper of boundaries who teaches through limitation.

sections.Story: Uranus is the awakener — sudden insight, revolution, and liberation from the old. It governs innovation, eccentricity, and the impulse to break free.
sections.Light: Originality, genius, liberation, humanitarian vision, breakthrough.
sections.Shadow: Rebellion without cause, detachment, instability, contrarianism.
sections.Archetype: The Revolutionary — the lightning bolt that shatters old forms.

sections.Story: Neptune dissolves boundaries — between self and other, real and imagined, sacred and mundane. It governs dreams, spirituality, compassion, and the longing to merge with something greater.
sections.Light: Compassion, imagination, spiritual devotion, artistic vision, transcendence.
sections.Shadow: Delusion, addiction, escapism, victimhood, confusion.
sections.Archetype: The Mystic — the one who sees through the veil.

sections.Story: Pluto is the force of transformation — death, rebirth, and the confrontation with power in its rawest form. It governs the underworld of the psyche and the process of radical change.
sections.Light: Transformation, regeneration, depth psychology, empowerment, truth.
sections.Shadow: Obsession, manipulation, power struggles, destructiveness.
sections.Archetype: The Alchemist — the one who transforms through descent into the depths.

sections.Story: The North Node points to your evolutionary direction — the unfamiliar territory your soul is growing toward in this lifetime. It feels uncomfortable precisely because it is new.
sections.Light: Growth edge, soul purpose, future direction, evolutionary calling.
sections.Shadow: Overreaching, anxiety about the unknown, spiritual bypassing.
sections.Archetype: The Compass — pointing toward what you came here to learn.

sections.Story: The South Node represents what you already know — gifts, patterns, and tendencies carried from the past. Mastery here is the foundation, but over-reliance becomes a trap.
sections.Light: Natural talent, deep familiarity, comfort zone, karmic gifts.
sections.Shadow: Stagnation, regression, repeating old patterns, avoiding growth.
sections.Archetype: The Ancestor — the inherited wisdom that can become a prison.

sections.Story: Chiron is the wound that becomes a gift. It shows where you carry a deep, often early wound — and where your greatest capacity to heal others lives.
sections.Light: Healing wisdom, mentorship, bridging worlds, compassionate teaching.
sections.Shadow: Chronic pain, feeling broken, avoiding the wound, over-identification with suffering.
sections.Archetype: The Wounded Healer — the one whose wound becomes medicine.

sections.Story: Aries is the spark of initiation — the first fire, the impulse to exist. Here energy moves before thought, asserting itself into being.
sections.Light: Courage, initiative, authenticity, pioneering spirit, directness.
sections.Shadow: Impatience, selfishness, combativeness, recklessness.
sections.Archetype: The Pioneer — first to arrive, first to act.

sections.Story: Taurus is embodiment — the pleasure of having form, of touching earth, of building something that lasts. Here spirit takes root in matter.
sections.Light: Stability, sensuality, patience, resourcefulness, loyalty.
sections.Shadow: Stubbornness, possessiveness, materialism, resistance to change.
sections.Archetype: The Builder — the one who gives form to what matters.

sections.Story: Gemini is the dance of duality — the mind that plays with ideas, makes connections, and refuses to be pinned to a single truth. Here reality becomes conversation.
sections.Light: Versatility, wit, curiosity, communication, adaptability.
sections.Shadow: Superficiality, inconsistency, gossip, restlessness.
sections.Archetype: The Storyteller — the one who gives voice to multiplicity.

sections.Story: Cancer is the shell and the softness within — the impulse to protect, nourish, and create a container for vulnerability. Here the emotional body becomes home.
sections.Light: Nurturing, emotional depth, protectiveness, tenacity, memory.
sections.Shadow: Clinginess, moodiness, defensiveness, emotional manipulation.
sections.Archetype: The Nurturer — the one who creates sanctuary.

sections.Story: Leo is the radiance of the creative self — the heart that shines, performs, and celebrates being alive. Here consciousness becomes an art form.
sections.Light: Creativity, generosity, warmth, leadership, self-expression.
sections.Shadow: Pride, attention-seeking, drama, stubbornness.
sections.Archetype: The Performer — the one whose light calls others to their own.

sections.Story: Virgo is devotion to craft — the sacred attention to detail, the impulse to refine, heal, and serve. Here consciousness meets the world through care.
sections.Light: Discernment, service, practical wisdom, humility, healing.
sections.Shadow: Perfectionism, criticism, anxiety, self-doubt.
sections.Archetype: The Healer — the one who makes whole through attention.

sections.Story: Libra is the art of relationship — the search for balance, beauty, and justice in the space between self and other. Here consciousness becomes dialogue.
sections.Light: Harmony, fairness, aesthetic sense, diplomacy, partnership.
sections.Shadow: Indecision, people-pleasing, avoidance of conflict, dependency.
sections.Archetype: The Artist — the one who creates beauty in the between.

sections.Story: Scorpio is the descent — the willingness to go where others won't, to face death, desire, and the raw truth of power. Here consciousness transforms through intensity.
sections.Light: Depth, passion, loyalty, psychological insight, regeneration.
sections.Shadow: Jealousy, manipulation, obsession, vindictiveness.
sections.Archetype: The Shaman — the one who travels between worlds.

sections.Story: Sagittarius is the arrow in flight — the search for meaning, truth, and horizons beyond the known. Here consciousness expands through vision and adventure.
sections.Light: Optimism, philosophy, adventure, generosity, truthfulness.
sections.Shadow: Dogmatism, excess, restlessness, bluntness, irresponsibility.
sections.Archetype: The Explorer — the one who follows the arrow of meaning.

sections.Story: Capricorn is the mountain — the slow, determined climb toward mastery and legacy. Here consciousness meets time, structure, and the weight of responsibility.
sections.Light: Ambition, discipline, integrity, practical wisdom, authority.
sections.Shadow: Coldness, workaholism, pessimism, rigidity, status obsession.
sections.Archetype: The Elder — the one who builds what endures.

sections.Story: Aquarius is the vision of what could be — the impulse toward collective evolution, individual freedom, and the future. Here consciousness serves the whole through radical originality.
sections.Light: Vision, humanitarianism, originality, intellectual independence.
sections.Shadow: Detachment, contrarianism, emotional avoidance, superiority.
sections.Archetype: The Visionary — the one who sees the future in the present.

sections.Story: Pisces is the ocean — the dissolution of separate self into the infinite. Here consciousness merges with everything, swimming in compassion, imagination, and the dream of unity.
sections.Light: Compassion, imagination, spirituality, artistic sensitivity, transcendence.
sections.Shadow: Escapism, victimhood, confusion, boundary dissolution.
sections.Archetype: The Dreamer — the one who remembers what the world has forgotten.

sections.Story: The house of self and emergence. How you appear, how you begin, how you enter a room and a life. The mask that becomes the face.
sections.Light: Self-awareness, physical vitality, personal initiative.
sections.Shadow: Self-absorption, identity crises, over-concern with image.

sections.Story: The house of resources and values. What you possess, what possesses you, and what you consider worth having. Your relationship to material reality.
sections.Light: Self-worth, material security, talent, sensory pleasure.
sections.Shadow: Greed, insecurity, over-attachment to possessions.

sections.Story: The house of communication and mind. How you speak, write, learn, and connect with your immediate environment. The neighborhood of consciousness.
sections.Light: Curiosity, articulation, mental agility, sibling bonds.
sections.Shadow: Gossip, scattered thinking, superficial connections.

sections.Story: The house of roots and foundation. Your home, your family of origin, your emotional bedrock. The place you return to when everything else falls away.
sections.Light: Emotional security, ancestry, belonging, inner foundation.
sections.Shadow: Family wounds, rootlessness, clinging to the past.

sections.Story: The house of creation and play. Where you make things for the joy of making them — children, art, romance, games. The stage where your heart performs.
sections.Light: Creative expression, romance, children, joy, risk-taking.
sections.Shadow: Drama addiction, gambling, narcissistic expression.

sections.Story: The house of service and daily practice. How you maintain your body, refine your craft, and serve the world through ordinary devotion. The sacred mundane.
sections.Light: Service, health awareness, craftsmanship, daily ritual.
sections.Shadow: Workaholism, hypochondria, perfectionism, servitude.

sections.Story: The house of the other. Your partnerships, marriages, open enemies, and projections. The mirror in which you see what you cannot see alone.
sections.Light: Partnership, commitment, diplomacy, balance through relationship.
sections.Shadow: Codependency, projection, loss of self in others.

sections.Story: The house of transformation and shared resources. Where you merge with others — financially, sexually, psychologically. The territory of death, inheritance, and rebirth.
sections.Light: Psychological depth, intimacy, shared power, transformation.
sections.Shadow: Power struggles, obsession, fear of loss, manipulation.

sections.Story: The house of expansion and meaning. Your philosophy, long journeys, higher education, and relationship to truth. Where you search for the big picture.
sections.Light: Wisdom, faith, cross-cultural understanding, philosophical depth.
sections.Shadow: Dogmatism, restlessness, spiritual bypassing, arrogance.

sections.Story: The house of vocation and public life. Your career, reputation, and contribution to the world. The peak of the chart — what you are seen to do.
sections.Light: Purpose, achievement, public contribution, authority.
sections.Shadow: Status obsession, workaholism, empty ambition, fear of failure.

sections.Story: The house of community and vision. Your friends, networks, hopes, and the groups you belong to. Where individual purpose meets collective dreaming.
sections.Light: Community, friendship, humanitarian ideals, innovation.
sections.Shadow: Conformity, detachment, misplaced idealism, loneliness in crowds.

sections.Story: The house of the unseen. Your unconscious, your connection to the collective dream, your hidden strengths and sorrows. The place before birth and after death.
sections.Light: Spiritual depth, compassion, artistic vision, surrender, healing.
sections.Shadow: Self-undoing, isolation, addiction, martyrdom, hidden enemies.

sections.Story: Two planets merge — their energies fuse into a single intensified force. Neither can be seen without the other. This is union, for better and worse.
sections.Light: Concentrated power, unified purpose, amplified expression.
sections.Shadow: Blind spots from over-identification, inability to separate energies.

sections.Story: Two planets face each other across the chart — a full-moon tension between polarities. The challenge is integration, not choosing sides.
sections.Light: Awareness through contrast, balance, objectivity, partnership dynamics.
sections.Shadow: Projection, polarization, seesaw between extremes.

sections.Story: Two planets flow together effortlessly — gifts that come naturally, talents that feel easy. The risk is taking them for granted.
sections.Light: Natural talent, ease, creative flow, harmony.
sections.Shadow: Complacency, laziness, wasted potential, taking gifts for granted.

sections.Story: Two planets clash at a right angle — creating friction, challenge, and ultimately growth. Squares are where the work is.
sections.Light: Motivation, dynamic tension, breakthrough, strength through challenge.
sections.Shadow: Chronic frustration, internal conflict, crisis patterns.

sections.Story: Two planets extend a hand — an opportunity aspect that requires a small effort to activate. The door is open but you must walk through it.
sections.Light: Opportunity, communication between energies, creative potential.
sections.Shadow: Missed opportunities from passivity, unrealized potential.

sections.Story: Two planets that have nothing in common — no element, no modality, no angle of recognition. The adjustment is perpetual, the integration creative and strange.
sections.Light: Creative adaptation, integrating the incompatible, resourcefulness.
sections.Shadow: Chronic adjustment fatigue, health issues from unresolved tension.
